title: Manage a wine making process
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage a wine making process demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine wine and wine making process

pcs.text: Determine the type and style of wine to be produced according to variety and characteristics of the grapes, winemaking factors, consumer preferences, client requirements and industry trends
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the type and style of wine to be produced according to variety and characteristics of the grapes, winemaking factors, consumer preferences, client requirements and industry trends?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the type and style of wine to be produced according to variety and characteristics of the grapes, winemaking factors, consumer preferences, client requirements and industry trends.

pcs.text: Determine the winemaking process to be followed according to type and style of wine to be produced, quality and quantity of grapes available, and availability of required equipment and personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the winemaking process to be followed according to type and style of wine to be produced, quality and quantity of grapes available, and availability of required equipment and personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the winemaking process to be followed according to type and style of wine to be produced, quality and quantity of grapes available, and availability of required equipment and personnel.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Determine wine and wine making process

elements.title: Acquire, deliver and prepare grapes for fermentation

pcs.text: Harvest and handle grapes according to standard vineyard practices and quality criteria
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Harvest and handle grapes according to standard vineyard practices and quality criteria?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Harvest and handle grapes according to standard vineyard practices and quality criteria.

pcs.text: Acquire and deliver the grapes that meet the desired variety and quality parameters to the winery
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Acquire and deliver the grapes that meet the desired variety and quality parameters to the winery?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Acquire and deliver the grapes that meet the desired variety and quality parameters to the winery.

pcs.text: Prepare grapes for fermentation, and deliver must or juice to fermentation vessels to meet the desired wine type and style requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare grapes for fermentation, and deliver must or juice to fermentation vessels to meet the desired wine type and style requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare grapes for fermentation, and deliver must or juice to fermentation vessels to meet the desired wine type and style requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Acquire, deliver and prepare grapes for fermentation

elements.title: Initiate a ferment

pcs.text: Select yeast types or strains to produce a given wine type and style
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select yeast types or strains to produce a given wine type and style?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select yeast types or strains to produce a given wine type and style.

pcs.text: Prepare fermentation vessels and transfer must or juice according to wine type and style requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare fermentation vessels and transfer must or juice according to wine type and style requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare fermentation vessels and transfer must or juice according to wine type and style requirements.

pcs.text: Prepare yeast culture according to specifications and add to fermentation vessels
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare yeast culture according to specifications and add to fermentation vessels?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare yeast culture according to specifications and add to fermentation vessels.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Initiate a ferment

elements.title: Manage primary fermentation

pcs.text: Monitor and adjust physical and chemical characteristics of ferment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor and adjust physical and chemical characteristics of ferment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor and adjust physical and chemical characteristics of ferment.

pcs.text: Predict potential fermentation problems
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Predict potential fermentation problems?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Predict potential fermentation problems.

pcs.text: Detect the presence of undesirable fermentation characteristics
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Detect the presence of undesirable fermentation characteristics?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Detect the presence of undesirable fermentation characteristics.

pcs.text: Outline steps to rectify fermentation problems
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Outline steps to rectify fermentation problems?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Outline steps to rectify fermentation problems.

pcs.text: Rack off gross lees or pressings into appropriate vessels at a determined time
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Rack off gross lees or pressings into appropriate vessels at a determined time?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Rack off gross lees or pressings into appropriate vessels at a determined time.

pcs.text: Maintain records of additions and adjustments
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain records of additions and adjustments?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain records of additions and adjustments.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Manage primary fermentation

elements.title: Manage secondary fermentation

pcs.text: Obtain and check oak barrels for serviceability for use if required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain and check oak barrels for serviceability for use if required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain and check oak barrels for serviceability for use if required.

pcs.text: Inoculate wine with selected malolactic fermentation bacteria
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inoculate wine with selected malolactic fermentation bacteria?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inoculate wine with selected malolactic fermentation bacteria.

pcs.text: Manage malolactic fermentation to the predetermined end point
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Manage malolactic fermentation to the predetermined end point?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Manage malolactic fermentation to the predetermined end point.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Manage secondary fermentation

elements.title: Mature wine in storage vessels

pcs.text: Select suitable maturation storage vessels to produce a given wine style and check for serviceability and use
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select suitable maturation storage vessels to produce a given wine style and check for serviceability and use?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select suitable maturation storage vessels to produce a given wine style and check for serviceability and use.

pcs.text: Transfer wine into the selected vessels according to determined wine style characteristics
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Transfer wine into the selected vessels according to determined wine style characteristics?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Transfer wine into the selected vessels according to determined wine style characteristics.

pcs.text: Monitor condition of wine in storage
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor condition of wine in storage?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor condition of wine in storage.

pcs.text: Bottle and seal wine according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Bottle and seal wine according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Bottle and seal wine according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Maintain wine production and storage records
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain wine production and storage records?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain wine production and storage records.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E6: Mature wine in storage vessels
